quality.completeness: High. All key mechanical and descriptive elements are present.
quality.clarity: Good. Descriptions are clear, using standard D&D 5e terminology.
quality.formatting_notes: The internal reference '[_web_](#web)' should ideally be standardized if this is for a strict system database.

benefits.details: Can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, hands free (Spider Climb effect).
Immune to being caught in webs; move through webs as if difficult terrain.

mechanics.power_level_assessment: Strong Very Rare item. Provides significant defensive, mobility, and utility options.
